name: MANITOWOC CO INC
business: Manitowoc provides high quality, customer-focused lifting products and services worldwide through its Grove, Manitowoc, National Crane, Potain, Shuttlelift, and Upfits by Aspen Equipment brands and its support-focused subsidiary MGX Equipment Services. The company's crane products are used in applications including energy production/distribution, utilities, datacenters, memory chip fabrication, petrochemical, industrial, infrastructure, and commercial and residential construction. It also offers expansive aftermarket services such as parts, field service, remanufacturing, training, and telematics.

exposures.sentence: Our crane products are used in a wide variety of applications throughout the world, including energy production/distribution and utility, datacenters, memory chip fabrication, petrochemical and industrial, infrastructure, such as road, bridge and airport construction, as well as commercial and residential construction.

catalysts.event: Opened expanded facility in Nashville, Tennessee and acquired territories of Ring Power Corporation
catalysts.sentence: In early 2025, we opened an expanded facility in Nashville, Tennessee and acquired certain territories and related assets of Ring Power Corporation, further expanding our direct-to-customer territories in Georgia, North Carolina, and South Carolina.

catalysts.event: Opened new and upgraded service locations in Meru, France; Bouaye, France; and Warsaw, Poland
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we opened new and upgraded service locations in Meru, France; Bouaye, France; and Warsaw, Poland, enhancing our service coverage for customers.

catalysts.event: Launch of ServiceMax global asset management system
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we achieved a milestone with the launch of ServiceMax, our global asset management system.

catalysts.event: Announced new distribution agreement with Hiab to offer loader cranes across 13 states
catalysts.sentence: In early 2026, we announced a new distribution agreement with Hiab to offer loader cranes across 13 states, expanding the products we can sell to our customers and providing service for those products.

catalysts.event: Debuting new 8-axle all-terrain crane at Conexpo trade show
catalysts.sentence: At the Conexpo trade show in March, we will debut our new 8-axle all-terrain crane, which we believe will play an important role in meeting customer needs.
